files_with_xxx_placeholder.description: Component that transforms astrological data into plain language. Implementation is complete but feature number (F-XXX) was never assigned.
Component that shows 3 suggested questions for the Oracle based on user profile. Implementation is complete but feature number (F-XXX) was never assigned.

findings.summary: Both files are fully implemented React components with complete functionality. The 'F-XXX' is a feature number placeholder in the JSDoc header comment that was never replaced with an actual feature ID (e.g., F-224, F-227, etc.).
patterns_observed: Feature placeholders follow the pattern 'F-XXX' in JSDoc comment headers
Both are working components with no obvious bugs or issues
The XXX placeholder should be replaced with the next available F-number from the feature tracking system
gaps: No feature ID has been assigned to these components
The components may need feature entries in SPEC.md or MAPA.md if not already present
